title: Vegan Nabemono Stew
description: A Japanese-inspired, vegan version of the popular hot pot dish. This stew is perfect for a cold winter night, with a flavorful broth and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: In a large pot, bring the nabemono broth mix to a boil.
Add the chopped celery and cook until tender.
Add the sliced mushrooms, bell peppers, and carrots.
Add the cubed tofu and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with soy sauce and sesame oil to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds.
Have fun and customize your stew with your favorite vegetables!
